name: media
description: A responsive image (or image-like media) with a controlled aspect ratio and radius. Alt text is a required decision, not an afterthought.

ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the media frame.

fit.description: How the image fills the frame.

decorative.description: When true, empty alt is emitted; when false, descriptive alt is required.

a11y.contrast: n/a — media is not text; overlaid text is the responsibility of the composing recipe.
notes: Meaningful images require descriptive alt text; decorative images emit empty alt so assistive tech skips them.
The frame reserves space via aspect-ratio to prevent layout shift on load.

elementor.notes: Compiles to the Elementor Image widget inside an aspect-ratio container.

mapping.rounded: Style → Border Radius, bound to a radius role
